import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

def process_batch(items):
    for item in items:
        if logger.isEnabledFor(logging.DEBUG):
            logger.debug("Processing item %s with payload %s", item["id"], item["payload"])
        result = transform(item)
        if logger.isEnabledFor(logging.INFO):
            logger.info("Completed item %s in %.3fs", item["id"], result["elapsed"])

def transform(item):
    return {"id": item["id"], "elapsed": 0.01}
